title: erigeron krylovii
intro: Erigeron krylovii, also known as Krylov's fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Erigeron krylovii include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Erigeron krylovii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
